subparts.text: What are the key challenges in programming embedded systems compared to general-purpose computing?
What are the key considerations while selecting an IDE for embedded system development?
What are the key differences between general-purpose processors and domain-specific processors?
Define RISC and CISC architectures. Provide examples of processors based on each architecture.
What are the fundamental stages of the embedded system design process? Explain each stage concisely.
What role do debugging tools play in embedded system development? Provide examples of commonly used debugging tools.
In an embedded health monitoring system, what are the critical considerations for processor and toolchain selection?
Explain the key elements of the ARM programmer’s model. What is the significance of the Program Status Register in ARM processors?
List the different categories of instructions in the ARM instruction set. How does the barrel shifter function in ARM instructions?
What are the key components of an embedded system? How does ARM architecture compare to other embedded system architectures?
